chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln. No.2518 of 2025 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on M.A. No.13520/2025 2. For orders on M.A. No.13521/2025 3. For hearing of Bail Application 24.9.2025 Mr. Muhammad Awais Malano, Advocate alongwith Applicant namely Muhammad Mobeen son of Humayun Hussain --------------------------- 1. Urgency disposed of. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through instant Cr. Bail Application, the applicant/ accused seeks protective bail in Crime No.131/2016 for offence under Section 17/22 Emigration Ordinance, 1979 at PS FIA AHT Circle, Karachi registered on 22.4.2016. Learned counsel for applicant states that recently when the applicant approached for renewal of his Passport, it transpired that the instant case is pending against him. He further submits that he has no connection with the crime and on the basis of staying two accused persons as guest, he has been involved and dragged by the FIA. That the applicant intends to appear before the trial Court to face the trial but apprehends his arrest. Be that as it may, without touching the merits of the case, the applicant above named is granted protective bail for a period of fifteen days from today which will expire on 08.10.2025 till 1:00 p.m. against the solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court just to enable him to approach the competent Court and seek remedy in accordance with law.

That the applicant intends to appear before the trial Court to face the trial but apprehends his arrest. Be that as it may, without touching the merits of the case, the applicant above named is granted protective bail for a period of fifteen days from today which will expire on 08.10.2025 till 1:00 p.m. against the solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court just to enable him to approach the competent Court and seek remedy in accordance with law. It is made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make appearance before the trial Court within the time prescribed, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE asim/pa
